<?php namespace Spatie\SignalAwareCommand; use Spatie\LaravelPackageTools\Package; use Spatie\LaravelPackageTools\PackageServiceProvider; class SignalAwareCommandServiceProvider extends PackageServiceProvider { public function configurePackage(Package $package): void { $package->name('signal-aware-command'); $this->app->singleton(Signal::class, function () { return new Signal(); }); } }
